text:
Imp's Wink (小悪魔のウインク) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game. If caught by the Imp's wink, the player will have an experience "greater than ecstasy."
__NOTOC__

Summary

Imp's Wink 小悪魔のウインク - This card summons forth a magical Imp. When this Imp winks at a player, it gives them the most amazing ecstatic feeling. She can appear multiple times within close proximity to the caster. Be warned as this feeling can get addictive.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.018 - 小悪魔のウインク 
このウインクを受けた者はこの世のものとは思えない程の絶頂感を味わうことができる。何度でも現れてウインクしてくれるが中毒に注意。
|-
![Eng]
|No.018 - Imp's Wink 
A person who has received this wink can taste the sense of climax not of this world. Can appear any number of time but attention to addiction.
|}
